name: Spritz Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter until light.
2. Add sugar and continue creaming until well combined.
3. Add eggs and almond flavoring; mix thoroughly.
4. Sift flour and salt together into a separate bowl.
5. Gradually add the sifted flour mixture to the butter mixture, mixing well.
6. Press the dough through a cookie press onto an ungreased baking sheet in desired shapes.
7. Bake at 350°F for 8 to 12 minutes until lightly golden.
Source: Festival Cookie Book by Donna Ransdell Fidonet COOKING echo
